scope: Independent QA on actual Zahia regenerated artifacts only
passed_checks: Actual source hash matches source_manifest and source file
No Zahia Aris full name in final PDF
No standalone surname Aris in final PDF
No candidate email, phone, LinkedIn/http marker, or personal city in final PDF
No GSMC or Mars 2026 hallucination in final PDF
KLESIA date remains Juin 2023 – A ce jour
JSON leaf coverage against final PDF has no content loss except non-rendered synthesis_policy metadata

blocking_findings.evidence: Final PDF text lines 123-133: page 2 ends with ASSURONE CONTEXTE then the orphan heading PRESTATIONS REALISEE; page 3 starts with ZAHIA / PRESTATIONS REALISEE (suite) and only then the bullets. This detaches the section heading from its body and leaves page 2 visibly underused.
blocking_findings.requirement: No awkward page break / no detached section opening; renderer must make the CV beautiful and readable, not merely pass automated QA.

blocking_findings.evidence: Source experience locations Montreuil (93), Asnières (92), Rueil-Malmaison (92), Paris (75), Saint-Ouen-l’Aumône (95) are omitted from structured.json and final PDF. Candidate personal location Jouy-Le-Moutier is correctly removed; mission/client locations are source facts, not contact details.
blocking_findings.requirement: Source CV is truth; list and preserve source facts unless explicitly excluded.

non_blocking_notes: Automated QA currently misses the ASSURONE orphan page-break issue; add a regression if this correction is implemented.

Vision tool was unavailable due upstream HTML error, so visual review used PDF text split, bounding boxes and density metrics; page 2 text bbox ends at y=529/842 with large blank area after the orphan heading.
